title: YAZAMER (Artificial Intelligence and Intelligent Systems Application and Research Center) - News
content:

Digital lira could shape Turkey's economic future!

Artificial intelligence showed 98% success in the preliminary diagnosis of patients diagnosed with OCD and BIPOLAR.

Be careful when using chargers and public WiFi outside!
